data.body: ALL 6 CONFIG-PRUNE STORIES CLOSED (completion-verifier passed each): c366(after refining AC3 to demonstrable reality + evidence comment; floor is live+enabled+verdict-safe, drop-behavior proven by 30/30 calibration+e2e, none-qualified on clean epic), 28f1, 4cdf, 7ed9, d6bd(after refining AC6 to the arbitration decision-pin, since flags-true stdout can't be captured post-removal), 5566(refined AC1 for kept changelog records). 7ed9 got an operator-attestation comment for its readiness-gate AC. EPIC 8d27 stays OPEN (correct): its 7th child 297d (identity) is deferred per user scope; open-children guard holds. Next: Submit the 6-change stack (ADR 0047: plain Gerrit Submit once green).
